title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Sharekhan - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Sharekhan - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
